  },

  wcByTitle: {
    "Office Assistant":"8810 — Clerical",
    "Office Manager":"8810 — Clerical",
    "Estimator":"6217 — Excavation / Trenching",
    "Project Manager":"6217 — Excavation / Trenching",
    "Director of Operations":"6217 — Excavation / Trenching",
    "Foreman":"6217 — Excavation / Trenching",
    "Superintendent":"6217 — Excavation / Trenching",
    "Pipe Layer":"6217 — Excavation / Trenching",
    "Top Guy":"6217 — Excavation / Trenching",
    "Excavator Operator":"6217 — Excavation / Trenching",
    "Dozer Operator":"6217 — Excavation / Trenching",
    "Loader Operator":"6217 — Excavation / Trenching",
    "Haul Truck Operator":"6217 — Excavation / Trenching",
    "Parts Runner":"8810 — Clerical"
  },

  occByTitle: {
    "Office Assistant":"43-6014",
    "Office Manager":"11-3013",
    "Estimator":"13-1051",
    "Project Manager":"11-9021",
    "Director of Operations":"11-1021",
    "Foreman":"47-1011",
    "Superintendent":"11-9021",
    "Pipe Layer":"47-2151",
    "Top Guy":"47-2152",
    "Excavator Operator":"47-2073",
    "Dozer Operator":"47-2073",
    "Loader Operator":"47-2073",
    "Haul Truck Operator":"53-3032",
    "Parts Runner":"53-7062"
  },

  billableByTitle: {
    "Office Assistant":false,
    "Office Manager":false,
    "Estimator":true,
    "Project Manager":true,
    "Director of Operations":true,
    "Foreman":true,
    "Superintendent":true,
    "Pipe Layer":true,
    "Top Guy":true,
    "Excavator Operator":true,
    "Dozer Operator":true,
    "Loader Operator":true,
    "Haul Truck Operator":true,
    "Parts Runner":false
  }
};
</script>

<!-- ══════════ PIN SCREEN ══════════ -->
<div id="pin-screen" class="screen active">
  <div class="pin-card">
    <div class="logo-block">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Crown Excavation" style="max-width:340px;width:100%;display:block;margin:0 auto 16px;">
      <div style="font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif;font-size:10px;color:rgba(245,167,53,0.65);letter-spacing:5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:4px;">HR Portal</div>
    </div>
    <div class="pin-title">HR Access</div>
    <div class="pin-sub">Enter your PIN to continue</div>
    <input type="password" class="pin-input" id="pin-input" maxlength="6"
      placeholder="••••" inputmode="numeric" autocomplete="off">
    <div class="pin-error" id="pin-error"></div>
    <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="checkPin()">Enter Portal</button>
    <div style="margin-top:20px;border-top:1px solid rgba(245,167,53,0.2);padding-top:16px;display:flex;">
      <div style="flex:1;text-align:center;border-right:1px solid rgba(245,167,53,0.15);padding:0 8px;">
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-dim);letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:3px;font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif;">System</div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--gold);font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif;font-weight:600;">QBO + CF</div>
      </div>
      <div style="flex:1;text-align:center;border-right:1px solid rgba(245,167,53,0.15);padding:0 8px;">
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-dim);letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:3px;font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif;">Access</div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--gold);font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif;font-weight:600;">HR Only</div>
      </div>
      <div style="flex:1;text-align:center;padding:0 8px;">
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-dim);letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:3px;font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif;">Build</div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--gold);font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif;font-weight:600;">2026.1</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════ DASHBOARD SCREEN ══════════ -->
<div id="dashboard-screen" class="screen">
  <nav class="top-nav">
    <div class="nav-brand">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Crown Excavation" style="height:30px;width:auto;display:block;">
      <div style="margin-left:6px;border-left:1px solid rgba(245,167,53,0.2);padding-left:10px;">
        <div class="nav-subtitle">HR Dashboard</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="nav-actions">
      <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onclick="exportExcel()">⬇ Export</button>
      <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="showForm()">+ New Employee</button>
    </div>
  </nav>

  <div class="dashboard-body">
    <!-- Stats -->
    <div class="stats-grid">
      <div class="stat-card">
        <div class="stat-label">Total Employees</div>
        <div class="stat-value stat-gold" id="stat-total">0</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-card">
        <div class="stat-label">Awaiting HR Action</div>
        <div class="stat-value stat-blue" id="stat-pending">0</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-card">
        <div class="stat-label">Insurance Queue</div>
        <div class="stat-value stat-purple" id="stat-insurance">0</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-card">
        <div class="stat-label">Fully Complete</div>
        <div class="stat-value stat-green" id="stat-complete">0</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Insurance Enrollment Queue -->
    <div id="insurance-queue-section" style="display:none;">
      <div class="alert-card">
        <div class="alert-header">
          <span>🛡</span>
          <div>
            <div class="alert-title">Insurance Enrollment Queue</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="alert-desc" id="insurance-queue-desc"></div>
        <div id="insurance-queue-list"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- 90 Day Reviews -->
    <div id="review-queue-section" style="display:none;">
      <div class="section-header">
        <span style="font-size:16px;">📅</span>
        <div class="section-title">Upcoming 90-Day Reviews</div>
      </div>
      <div class="review-section">
        <div id="review-queue-list"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- All Employees -->
    <div class="section-header">
      <span style="font-size:16px;">👥</span>
      <div class="section-title">All Employees</div>
    </div>
    <div class="employee-table">
      <div class="table-header">
        <div class="table-col">ID</div>
        <div class="table-col">Name</div>
        <div class="table-col">Job Title</div>
        <div class="table-col">Hire Date</div>
        <div class="table-col">Status</div>
      </div>
      <div id="employee-list">
        <div class="empty-state">No employees yet. Add your first hire above.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════ FORM SCREEN ══════════ -->
<div id="form-screen" class="screen">
  <nav class="top-nav">
    <div class="nav-brand">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Crown Excavation" style="height:30px;width:auto;display:block;">
      <div style="margin-left:6px;border-left:1px solid rgba(245,167,53,0.2);padding-left:10px;">
        <div class="nav-subtitle">New Hire Setup</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="nav-actions">
      <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onclick="showDashboard()">← Dashboard</button>
    </div>
  </nav>

  <div class="form-body">
    <!-- Step Indicator -->
    <div style="margin-bottom:28px;">
      <div class="step-indicator">
        <div class="step-wrapper">
          <div class="step-dot active" id="step-dot-1">1</div>
        </div>
        <div class="step-line" id="step-line-1"></div>
        <div class="step-wrapper">
          <div class="step-dot" id="step-dot-2">2</div>
        </div>
        <div class="step-line" id="step-line-2"></div>
        <div class="step-wrapper">
          <div class="step-dot" id="step-dot-3">3</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-top:6px;">
        <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;text-align:center;flex:1;">New Hire Details</div>
        <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;text-align:center;flex:1;" id="step2-label">CF Setup</div>
        <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;text-align:center;flex:1;" id="step3-label">Review & Send</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- STEP 1 -->
    <div id="step-1">

      <!-- Identity -->
      <div class="form-card">
        <div class="form-card-header">
          <div class="form-card-icon">👤</div>
          <div>
            <div class="form-card-title">New Hire Details</div>
            <div class="form-card-sub">Identity, job, pay, equipment</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-card-body">
          <div class="section-divider">Identity</div>
          <div class="field-row">
            <div class="field-group">
              <label class="field-label">First Name<span class="field-required">*</span></label>
              <input type="text" class="field-input" id="f-first" placeholder="First">
            </div>
            <div class="field-group">
              <label class="field-label">Last Name<span class="field-required">*</span></label>
              <input type="text" class="field-input" id="f-last" placeholder="Last">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="field-row">
            <div class="field-group">
              <label class="field-label">Employee Email</label>
              <input type="email" class="field-input" id="f-email" placeholder="employee@email.com">
            </div>
            <div class="field-group">
              <label class="field-label">Cell Phone</label>
              <input type="tel" class="field-input" id="f-phone" placeholder="(317) 000-0000">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="field-hint" style="margin-bottom:4px;">At least one required — email or cell. QBO invite can be sent by text.</div>

          <div class="section-divider">Job & Role</div>
          <div class="field-hint" style="margin-bottom:12px;">Selecting a job title auto-fills department, workers comp class, occ code, and billable status.</div>
          <div class="field-group">
            <label class="field-label">Job Title<span class="field-required">*</span></label>
            <select class="field-select" id="f-title" onchange="autoFillFromTitle()">
              <option value="">Select job title</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="field-row">
            <div class="field-group">
              <label class="field-label">Department</label>
              <select class="field-select" id="f-dept">
                <option value="">Select department</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <div class="field-group">
              <label class="field-label">Manager</label>
              <input type="text" class="field-input" id="f-manager" placeholder="e.g., Dave Brawner">
              <div class="field-hint">Direct supervisor for this employee</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="field-row">
            <div class="field-group">
              <label class="field-label">Workers Comp Class</label>
              <select class="field-select" id="f-wc">
                <option value="">Select or auto-fill</option>
                <option>8810 — Clerical</option>
                <option>6217 — Excavation / Trenching</option>
              </select>
              <div class="field-hint auto" id="wc-hint" style="display:none;">✓ Auto-filled from job title</div>
            </div>
            <div class="field-group">
              <label class="field-label">Occupational Code</label>
              <input type="text" class="field-input" id="f-occ" placeholder="e.g., 47-1011">
              <div class="field-hint auto" id="occ-hint" style="display:none;">✓ Auto-filled from job title</div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Billable -->
          <div class="field-group">
            <div class="checkbox-item" id="billable-check" onclick="toggleCheck(this,'f-billable')">
              <input type="checkbox" id="f-billable">
              <div class="checkbox-box" id="billable-box">✓</div>
              <div>
                <div class="checkbox-text">Billable by Default</div>
                <div class="checkbox-desc">When ON: all time entries for this employee are automatically marked billable. Turn OFF for office staff and overhead roles.</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="section-divider">Pay</div>
          <div class="field-hint" style="margin-bottom:12px;">Enter pay information once. Billing rate is optional for job costing.</div>
          <div class="field-group">
            <label class="field-label">Pay Type<span class="field-required">*</span></label>
            <div class="radio-group">
              <div class="radio-option">
                <input type="radio" name="paytype" id="pt-hourly" value="Hourly" onchange="togglePayFields()" checked>
                <label class="radio-label" for="pt-hourly">Hourly</label>
              </div>
              <div class="radio-option">
                <input type="radio" name="paytype" id="pt-salary" value="Salary" onchange="togglePayFields()">
                <label class="radio-label" for="pt-salary">Salary</label>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div id="hourly-fields">
            <div class="field-row">
              <div class="field-group">
                <label class="field-label">Hourly Rate ($)<span class="field-required">*</span></label>
                <input type="number" class="field-input" id="f-hourly" placeholder="0.00" step="0.01" oninput="autoFillBilling()">
              </div>
              <div class="field-group">
                <label class="field-label">Billing Rate / Hr ($)</label>
                <input type="number" class="field-input" id="f-billing" placeholder="0.00" step="0.01">
                <div class="field-hint auto">Auto-filled at 1.5x hourly rate — editable</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div id="salary-fields" style="display:none;">
            <div class="field-group">
              <label class="field-label">Annual Salary ($)<span class="field-required">*</span></label>
              <input type="number" class="field-input" id="f-salary" placeholder="0.00" step="1000">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="field-group">
            <label class="field-label">Pay Schedule</label>
            <input type="text" class="field-input" id="f-payschedule" value="Every Friday" readonly style="color:var(--green);">
          </div>

          <div class="section-divider">Hire Details</div>
          <div class="field-row">
            <div class="field-group">
              <label class="field-label">Hire Date<span class="field-required">*</span></label>
              <input type="date" class="field-input" id="f-hiredate">
            </div>
            <div class="field-group">
              <label class="field-label">Work Location</label>
              <input type="text" class="field-input" id="f-location" value="1425 Iron Liege Rd, Indianapolis, IN 46217">
            </div>
          </div>



          <div class="section-divider">Benefits — Verbal Confirmation</div>
          <div class="field-hint" style="margin-bottom:12px;">Check what the candidate verbally confirmed interest in during the interview.</div>
          <div class="checkbox-group">
            <div class="checkbox-item" id="bene-401k-check" onclick="toggleCheck(this,'f-401k')">
              <input type="checkbox" id="f-401k">
              <div class="checkbox-box" id="bene-401k-box">✓</div>
              <div>
                <div class="checkbox-text">401(k) — Interested</div>
                <div class="checkbox-desc">Candidate verbally confirmed interest in enrolling in the company 401(k) plan.</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="checkbox-item" id="bene-ins-check" onclick="toggleCheck(this,'f-bene-ins')">
              <input type="checkbox" id="f-bene-ins">
              <div class="checkbox-box" id="bene-ins-box">✓</div>
              <div>
                <div class="checkbox-text">Insurance Bundle — Interested</div>
                <div class="checkbox-desc">Candidate verbally confirmed interest in the bundle package: life, medical, dental, and vision insurance.</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="section-divider" style="margin-top:20px;">Equipment & Asset Assignment</div>
          <div class="checkbox-group">
            <div class="checkbox-item" id="ipad-check" onclick="toggleCheck(this,'f-ipad')">
              <input type="checkbox" id="f-ipad">
              <div class="checkbox-box" id="ipad-box">✓</div>
              <div>
                <div class="checkbox-text">Company iPad</div>
                <div class="checkbox-desc">Assign an iPad to this employee</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="checkbox-item" id="card-check" onclick="toggleCheck(this,'f-card')">
              <input type="checkbox" id="f-card">
              <div class="checkbox-box" id="card-box">✓</div>
              <div>
                <div class="checkbox-text">Company Credit Card</div>
                <div class="checkbox-desc">Assign a company card</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="checkbox-item" id="vehicle-check" onclick="toggleCheck(this,'f-vehicle')">
              <input type="checkbox" id="f-vehicle">
              <div class="checkbox-box" id="vehicle-box">✓</div>
              <div>
                <div class="checkbox-text">Company Vehicle</div>
                <div class="checkbox-desc">Assign a company vehicle</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="section-divider" style="margin-top:20px;">Notes</div>
          <div class="field-group">
            <label class="field-label">Internal Notes</label>
            <textarea class="field-textarea" id="f-notes" placeholder="Special arrangements, equipment notes, referral info, anything else relevant to this hire..."></textarea>
            <div class="field-hint">Visible to HR only — not shared with employee</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-nav">
        <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="showDashboard()">← Cancel</button>
        <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="goToStep(2)">Next →</button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- STEP 2: CF Setup -->
    <div id="step-2" style="display:none;">
      <div class="form-card">
        <div class="form-card-header">
          <div class="form-card-icon">🏗</div>
          <div>
            <div class="form-card-title">Contractor Foreman Setup</div>
            <div class="form-card-sub">Login access, crew assignment, and project visibility</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-card-body">
          <div class="section-divider">Crew & Access</div>
          <div class="field-row">
            <div class="field-group">
              <label class="field-label">Crew Assignment</label>
              <select class="field-select" id="f-crew">
                <option value="">Select crew</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <div class="field-group">
              <label class="field-label">CF Role</label>
              <select class="field-select" id="f-cfrole">
                <option value="">Select CF role</option>
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="section-divider">Login Details</div>
          <div class="field-group">
            <label class="field-label">Login Email</label>
            <input type="email" class="field-input" id="f-login" placeholder="Auto-filled from employee email">
            <div class="field-hint auto">Auto-filled from employee email above — editable override</div>
          </div>

          <div class="section-divider">Access Settings</div>
          <div class="checkbox-group">
            <div class="checkbox-item" id="login-check" onclick="toggleCheck(this,'f-login-access')">
              <input type="checkbox" id="f-login-access">
              <div class="checkbox-box" id="login-box">✓</div>
              <div>
                <div class="checkbox-text">Allow Login Access</div>
                <div class="checkbox-desc">Employee can clock in/out and use the CF app</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="checkbox-item" id="timecard-check" onclick="toggleCheck(this,'f-timecard')">
              <input type="checkbox" id="f-timecard">
              <div class="checkbox-box" id="timecard-box">✓</div>
              <div>
                <div class="checkbox-text">Take Directly to Timecard</div>
                <div class="checkbox-desc">Opens timecard immediately upon login</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="checkbox-item" id="schedule-check" onclick="toggleCheck(this,'f-schedule')">
              <input type="checkbox" id="f-schedule">
              <div class="checkbox-box" id="schedule-box">✓</div>
              <div>
                <div class="checkbox-text">Show in Crew Schedule</div>
                <div class="checkbox-desc">Employee appears on the crew scheduling board</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="section-divider" style="margin-top:20px;">Project Visibility</div>
          <div class="field-group">
            <label class="field-label">Viewable Projects</label>
            <div class="radio-group">
              <div class="radio-option">
                <input type="radio" name="visibility" id="vis-all" value="All Projects" checked>
                <label class="radio-label" for="vis-all">All Projects</label>
              </div>
              <div class="radio-option">
                <input type="radio" name="visibility" id="vis-assigned" value="Assigned Only">
                <label class="radio-label" for="vis-assigned">Assigned Only</label>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="section-divider">Default Cost Code</div>
          <div class="field-group">
            <label class="field-label">Default Cost Code</label>
            <select class="field-select" id="f-costcode">
              <option value="">Select cost code (optional)</option>
            </select>
            <div class="field-hint">Applied to new time entries by default</div>
          </div>


        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-nav">
        <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="goToStep(1)">← Previous</button>
        <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="goToStep(3)">Next →</button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- STEP 3: Review & Send -->
    <div id="step-3" style="display:none;">
      <div class="review-card">
        <div class="review-card-header" style="background:var(--surface2);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;">
          <span style="font-size:18px;">📋</span>
          <div>
            <div class="review-card-title">New Hire Summary</div>
            <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:2px;">Review all details before submitting</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div id="review-content"></div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-nav">
        <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="goToStep(2)">← Previous</button>
        <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="submitForm()">✓ Submit & Notify HR</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════ SUCCESS SCREEN ══════════ -->
<div id="success-screen" class="screen">
  <div class="success-card">
    <div class="success-icon">✓</div>
    <div class="success-title">Record Created!</div>
    <div class="success-id" id="success-id"></div>

    <div class="success-notice">
      <div class="notice-label">📧 Notify HR</div>
      <div class="notice-text" id="success-email-notice" style="margin-bottom:10px;"></div>
      <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;">
        <button class="btn btn-primary" style="width:100%;justify-content:center;" onclick="showEmailModal()">
          📬 Send HR Notification
        </button>
        <button class="btn btn-ghost" style="width:100%;justify-content:center;" onclick="copyEmailContent()">
          📋 Copy Email Content
        </button>
        <div id="copy-confirm" style="display:none;font-size:11px;color:var(--green);text-align:center;margin-top:2px;">✓ Copied — paste into a new email</div>
        <div id="email-addresses" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);text-align:center;"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="action-list">
      <div class="action-list-title">⚡ Your Next Steps</div>
      <div class="action-item"><div class="action-num">1</div><div>Send handbook via DocuSign — wait for signed copy before proceeding</div></div>
      <div class="action-item"><div class="action-num">2</div><div>Set up employee in QBO Payroll — send self-onboarding invite</div></div>
      <div class="action-item"><div class="action-num">3</div><div>Set up employee in Contractor Foreman using CF Setup info</div></div>
      <div class="action-item" id="insurance-action-item" style="display:none;"><div class="action-num">4</div><div>Call insurance — employee confirmed interest in bundle. Prep enrollment paperwork.</div></div>
      <div class="action-item" id="k401-action-item" style="display:none;"><div class="action-num">5</div><div>Set up 401(k) enrollment for this employee.</div></div>
    </div>

    <a class="calendar-btn" id="calendar-link" href="#" target="_blank">
      📅 Add 90-Day Review to Outlook Calendar
    </a>

    <div class="success-actions">
      <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="newEmployee()">+ New Employee</button>
      <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="showDashboard()">Go to Dashboard</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════ EMPLOYEE DETAIL MODAL ══════════ -->
<div class="modal-overlay" id="detail-modal" onclick="closeModal(event)">
  <div class="modal">
    <div class="modal-header">
      <div class="modal-title" id="modal-title">Employee Detail</div>
      <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModalDirect()">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body" id="modal-body"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
// ── STATE ──
let employees = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('crown_employees') || '[]');
let currentStep = 1;
let lastSubmitted = null;

// ── INIT ──
window.onload = () => {
  populateDropdowns();
  renderDashboard();
};

function populateDropdowns() {
  const sel = (id, arr) => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (!el) return;
    arr.forEach(v => {
      const o = document.createElement('option');
      o.value = v; o.textContent = v;
      el.appendChild(o);
    });
  };
  sel('f-title', CONFIG.jobTitles);
  sel('f-dept', CONFIG.departments);
  sel('f-crew', CONFIG.crews);
  sel('f-cfrole', CONFIG.cfRoles);
  sel('f-costcode', CONFIG.costCodes);
}

// ── PIN ──
function checkPin() {
  const val = document.getElementById('pin-input').value;
  const err = document.getElementById('pin-error');
  const inp = document.getElementById('pin-input');
  if (val === CONFIG.pin) {
    showDashboard();
  } else {
    err.textContent = 'Incorrect PIN. Try again.';
    inp.classList.add('error');
    inp.value = '';
    setTimeout(() => inp.classList.remove('error'), 400);
  }
}

document.getElementById('pin-input').addEventListener('keydown', e => {
  if (e.key === 'Enter') checkPin();
});

// ── SCREEN NAVIGATION ──
function showScreen(id) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.screen').forEach(s => s.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById(id).classList.add('active');
  window.scrollTo(0,0);
}

function showDashboard() {
  renderDashboard();
  showScreen('dashboard-screen');
}

function showForm() {
  currentStep = 1;
  resetForm();
  updateStepUI(1);
  showScreen('form-screen');
}

// ── AUTO FILLS ──
function autoFillFromTitle() {
  const title = document.getElementById('f-title').value;
  if (!title) return;

  const dept = CONFIG.deptByTitle[title] || '';
  const wc = CONFIG.wcByTitle[title] || '';
  const occ = CONFIG.occByTitle[title] || '';
  const billable = CONFIG.billableByTitle[title] || false;

  if (dept) {
    document.getElementById('f-dept').value = dept;
  }

  if (wc) {
    const wcEl = document.getElementById('f-wc');
    wcEl.value = wc;
    // If value didn't match any option, add it dynamically
    if (wcEl.value !== wc) {
      const opt = document.createElement('option');
      opt.value = wc; opt.textContent = wc;
      wcEl.appendChild(opt);
      wcEl.value = wc;
    }
    wcEl.classList.add('auto-filled');
    document.getElementById('wc-hint').style.display = 'block';
  }

  if (occ) {
    document.getElementById('f-occ').value = occ;
    document.getElementById('f-occ').classList.add('auto-filled');
    document.getElementById('occ-hint').style.display = 'block';
  }

  const billCheck = document.getElementById('billable-check');
  const billInput = document.getElementById('f-billable');
  if (billable) {
    billCheck.classList.add('checked');
    billInput.checked = true;
    document.getElementById('billable-box').textContent = '✓';
  } else {
    billCheck.classList.remove('checked');
    billInput.checked = false;
    document.getElementById('billable-box').textContent = '';
  }
}

function autoFillBilling() {
  const hourly = parseFloat(document.getElementById('f-hourly').value) || 0;
  if (hourly > 0) {
    document.getElementById('f-billing').value = (hourly * CONFIG.billingMultiplier).toFixed(2);
  }
}

function togglePayFields() {
  const isHourly = document.getElementById('pt-hourly').checked;
  document.getElementById('hourly-fields').style.display = isHourly ? 'block' : 'none';
  document.getElementById('salary-fields').style.display = isHourly ? 'none' : 'block';
}

// ── CHECKBOX TOGGLE ──
function toggleCheck(container, inputId) {
  const input = document.getElementById(inputId);
  input.checked = !input.checked;
  const isChecked = input.checked;
  container.classList.toggle('checked', isChecked);
  const box = container.querySelector('.checkbox-box');
  if (box) box.textContent = isChecked ? '✓' : '';
}

// ── STEP NAVIGATION ──
function goToStep(n) {
  if (n === 2) {
    if (!validateStep1()) return;
    // Auto-fill CF login email from employee email
    const email = document.getElementById('f-email').value;
    const loginField = document.getElementById('f-login');
    if (email && !loginField.value) loginField.value = email;
  }
  if (n === 3) {
    buildReview();
  }
  currentStep = n;
  updateStepUI(n);
  document.getElementById(`step-${n}`).style.display = 'block';
  [1,2,3].filter(i => i !== n).forEach(i => {
    document.getElementById(`step-${i}`).style.display = 'none';
  });
  window.scrollTo(0,0);
}

function updateStepUI(active) {
  [1,2,3].forEach(i => {
    const dot = document.getElementById(`step-dot-${i}`);
    dot.classList.remove('active','done');
    if (i < active) dot.classList.add('done');
    else if (i === active) dot.classList.add('active');
  });
  [1,2].forEach(i => {
    const line = document.getElementById(`step-line-${i}`);
    if (line) line.classList.toggle('done', i < active);
  });
  const labels = ['step2-label','step3-label'];
  labels.forEach((id,idx) => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (el) el.style.color = (idx + 2) === active ? 'var(--gold)' : 'var(--text-muted)';
  });
}

// ── VALIDATION ──
function validateStep1() {
  const required = [
    {id:'f-first', label:'First Name'},
    {id:'f-last', label:'Last Name'},
    {id:'f-title', label:'Job Title'},
    {id:'f-hiredate', label:'Hire Date'}
  ];
  // Require at least email or phone
  const emailVal = document.getElementById('f-email').value.trim();
  const phoneVal = document.getElementById('f-phone').value.trim();
  if (!emailVal && !phoneVal) {
    alert('Please enter at least an email address or cell phone number.');
    document.getElementById('f-email').focus();
    return false;
  }
  for (const r of required) {
    const el = document.getElementById(r.id);
    if (!el.value.trim()) {
      alert(`Please enter ${r.label} before continuing.`);
      el.focus();
      return false;
    }
  }
  const isHourly = document.getElementById('pt-hourly').checked;
  if (isHourly && !document.getElementById('f-hourly').value) {
    alert('Please enter the Hourly Rate.');
    document.getElementById('f-hourly').focus();
    return false;
  }
  if (!isHourly && !document.getElementById('f-salary').value) {
    alert('Please enter the Annual Salary.');
    document.getElementById('f-salary').focus();
    return false;
  }
  return true;
}

// ── REVIEW BUILD ──
function buildReview() {
  const isHourly = document.getElementById('pt-hourly').checked;
  const payInfo = isHourly
    ? `Hourly — $${document.getElementById('f-hourly').value}/hr`
    : `Salary — $${Number(document.getElementById('f-salary').value).toLocaleString()}/yr`;

  const visibility = document.querySelector('input[name="visibility"]:checked')?.value || '';
  const assets = [];
  if (document.getElementById('f-ipad').checked) assets.push('iPad');
  if (document.getElementById('f-card').checked) assets.push('Credit Card');
  if (document.getElementById('f-vehicle').checked) assets.push('Vehicle');

  const accessFlags = [];
  if (document.getElementById('f-login-access').checked) accessFlags.push('Login Access');
  if (document.getElementById('f-timecard').checked) accessFlags.push('Direct to Timecard');
  if (document.getElementById('f-schedule').checked) accessFlags.push('Show in Schedule');

  const bene401k = document.getElementById('f-401k').checked ? 'Yes — interested' : 'No';
  const beneIns = document.getElementById('f-bene-ins').checked ? 'Yes — interested' : 'No';

  const hireDate = document.getElementById('f-hiredate').value;
  const review90 = hireDate ? calc90Day(hireDate) : 'N/A';

  const sections = [
    {
      title: 'Identity',
      rows: [
        ['Full Name', `${document.getElementById('f-first').value} ${document.getElementById('f-last').value}`],
        ['Email', document.getElementById('f-email').value || '—'],
        ['Cell Phone', document.getElementById('f-phone').value || '—'],
        ['Job Title', document.getElementById('f-title').value],
        ['Department', document.getElementById('f-dept').value],
        ['Manager', document.getElementById('f-manager').value || '—'],
      ]
    },
    {
      title: 'Classification',
      rows: [
        ['Workers Comp', document.getElementById('f-wc').value || '—'],
        ['Occ Code', document.getElementById('f-occ').value || '—'],
        ['Billable', document.getElementById('f-billable').checked ? 'Yes' : 'No'],
      ]
    },
    {
      title: 'Pay',
      rows: [
        ['Pay Type', payInfo],
        ['Billing Rate', document.getElementById('f-billing').value ? `$${document.getElementById('f-billing').value}/hr` : '—'],
        ['Pay Schedule', document.getElementById('f-payschedule').value],
      ]
    },
    {
      title: 'Hire Details',
      rows: [
        ['Hire Date', hireDate],
        ['Work Location', document.getElementById('f-location').value],

        ['90-Day Review', review90],
      ]
    },
    {
      title: 'Benefits — Verbal Confirmations',
      rows: [
        ['401(k) Interest', bene401k],
        ['Insurance Bundle Interest', beneIns],
      ]
    },
    {
      title: 'Equipment',
      rows: [
        ['Assets Assigned', assets.length ? assets.join(', ') : 'None'],
      ]
    },
    {
      title: 'Contractor Foreman',
      rows: [
        ['Crew', document.getElementById('f-crew').value || '—'],
        ['CF Role', document.getElementById('f-cfrole').value || '—'],
        ['Login Email', document.getElementById('f-login').value || '—'],
        ['Access Settings', accessFlags.length ? accessFlags.join(', ') : 'None'],
        ['Project Visibility', visibility],
        ['Default Cost Code', document.getElementById('f-costcode').value || '—'],
      ]
    },
  ];

  const html = sections.map(s => `
    <div class="review-card-header" style="padding:10px 20px;background:var(--surface3);border-top:1px solid var(--surface3);">
      <div class="review-card-title">${s.title}</div>
    </div>
    ${s.rows.map(([k,v]) => `
      <div class="review-row-item">
        <div class="review-key">${k}</div>
        <div class="review-val">${v}</div>
      </div>
    `).join('')}
  `).join('');

  document.getElementById('review-content').innerHTML = html;
}

// ── SUBMIT ──
function submitForm() {
  const isHourly = document.getElementById('pt-hourly').checked;
  const id = generateID();
  const hireDate = document.getElementById('f-hiredate').value;
  const review90 = calc90Day(hireDate);
  const bene401k = document.getElementById('f-401k').checked;
  const beneIns = document.getElementById('f-bene-ins').checked;

  const emp = {
    id,
    firstName: document.getElementById('f-first').value,
    lastName: document.getElementById('f-last').value,
    email: document.getElementById('f-email').value,
    phone: document.getElementById('f-phone').value,
    title: document.getElementById('f-title').value,
    dept: document.getElementById('f-dept').value,
    manager: document.getElementById('f-manager').value,
    wc: document.getElementById('f-wc').value,
    occ: document.getElementById('f-occ').value,
    billable: document.getElementById('f-billable').checked,
    payType: isHourly ? 'Hourly' : 'Salary',
    hourlyRate: document.getElementById('f-hourly').value,
    salary: document.getElementById('f-salary').value,
    billingRate: document.getElementById('f-billing').value,
    paySchedule: document.getElementById('f-payschedule').value,
    hireDate,
    location: document.getElementById('f-location').value,
    insurance,
    bene401k,
    beneIns,
    ipad: document.getElementById('f-ipad').checked,
    card: document.getElementById('f-card').checked,
    vehicle: document.getElementById('f-vehicle').checked,
    notes: document.getElementById('f-notes').value,
    crew: document.getElementById('f-crew').value,
    cfRole: document.getElementById('f-cfrole').value,
    loginEmail: document.getElementById('f-login').value,
    loginAccess: document.getElementById('f-login-access').checked,
    timecard: document.getElementById('f-timecard').checked,
    crewSchedule: document.getElementById('f-schedule').checked,
    visibility: document.querySelector('input[name="visibility"]:checked')?.value,
    costCode: document.getElementById('f-costcode').value,
    review90,
    status: 'pending',
    submittedAt: new Date().toISOString()
  };

  employees.push(emp);
  localStorage.setItem('crown_employees', JSON.stringify(employees));
  lastSubmitted = emp;

  // Store email content and show success screen
  const emailData = buildEmailContent(emp);
  window._lastEmailSubject = emailData.subject;
  window._lastEmailBody = emailData.body;
  window._lastEmailTo = CONFIG.notifyEmails.join(',');

  // Show success screen
  showSuccessScreen(emp);
}

function buildEmailContent(emp) {
  const payInfo = emp.payType === 'Hourly'
    ? `Hourly — $${emp.hourlyRate}/hr (Billing: $${emp.billingRate}/hr)`
    : `Salary — $${Number(emp.salary).toLocaleString()}/yr`;
  const assets = [];
  if (emp.ipad) assets.push('iPad');
  if (emp.card) assets.push('Credit Card');
  if (emp.vehicle) assets.push('Vehicle');
  const subject = `New Hire Setup Complete — ${emp.firstName} ${emp.lastName} (${emp.id})`;
  const body = `Dave has completed a new hire setup in the Crown HR portal. Please take action on the following steps.

EMPLOYEE: ${emp.firstName} ${emp.lastName}
CELL PHONE: ${emp.phone || '—'}
EMPLOYEE ID: ${emp.id}
JOB TITLE: ${emp.title}
DEPARTMENT: ${emp.dept}
MANAGER: ${emp.manager || '—'}
HIRE DATE: ${emp.hireDate}
90-DAY REVIEW DATE: ${emp.review90}

--- PAY ---
${payInfo}
Pay Schedule: ${emp.paySchedule}
Workers Comp Class: ${emp.wc}
Occupational Code: ${emp.occ}
Billable by Default: ${emp.billable ? 'Yes' : 'No'}

--- BENEFITS (VERBAL CONFIRMATIONS) ---
401(k) Interest: ${emp.bene401k ? 'YES — prepare enrollment' : 'No'}
Insurance Bundle Interest: ${emp.beneIns ? 'YES — call insurance, prep enrollment paperwork' : 'No'}

--- EQUIPMENT ASSIGNED ---
${assets.length ? assets.join(', ') : 'None'}

--- CONTRACTOR FOREMAN SETUP ---
Crew: ${emp.crew || '—'}
CF Role: ${emp.cfRole || '—'}
Login Email: ${emp.loginEmail || '—'}
Login Access: ${emp.loginAccess ? 'Yes' : 'No'}
Direct to Timecard: ${emp.timecard ? 'Yes' : 'No'}
Show in Schedule: ${emp.crewSchedule ? 'Yes' : 'No'}
Project Visibility: ${emp.visibility || '—'}
Default Cost Code: ${emp.costCode || '—'}

--- NOTES ---
${emp.notes || 'None'}

--- YOUR ACTION CHECKLIST ---
1. Send handbook via DocuSign (wait for signed copy before proceeding)
2. Set up employee in QBO Payroll and send self-onboarding invite (email or text)
3. Set up employee in Contractor Foreman
${emp.beneIns ? '4. Call insurance — employee interested in bundle (life, medical, dental, vision)' : ''}
${emp.bene401k ? '5. Set up 401(k) enrollment' : ''}
--- Crown Excavation HR Portal ---`.trim();
  return { subject, body };
}

function sendNotificationEmail(emp) {
  const { subject, body } = buildEmailContent(emp);
  const to = CONFIG.notifyEmails.join(',');
  const mailtoLink = `mailto:${to}?subject=${encodeURIComponent(subject)}&body=${encodeURIComponent(body)}`;
  // Try mailto first, then fall back to showing copy button
  const win = window.open(mailtoLink, '_blank');
  // Store for copy fallback
  window._lastEmailSubject = subject;
  window._lastEmailBody = body;
  window._lastEmailTo = to;
}

function showSuccessScreen(emp) {
  setTimeout(() => {
    document.getElementById('success-id').textContent = `${emp.firstName} ${emp.lastName} — ID: ${emp.id}`;
    document.getElementById('success-email-notice').textContent =
      `Send to: ${CONFIG.notifyEmails.join(' and ')}`;
    document.getElementById('email-addresses').textContent = CONFIG.notifyEmails.join(' · ');
    // Pre-fill email modal
    document.getElementById('email-to-field').textContent = CONFIG.notifyEmails.join(', ');
    document.getElementById('email-subject-field').textContent = window._lastEmailSubject || '';
    document.getElementById('email-body-field').value = window._lastEmailBody || '';

    // Insurance/401k action items
    document.getElementById('insurance-action-item').style.display = emp.beneIns ? 'flex' : 'none';
    document.getElementById('k401-action-item').style.display = emp.bene401k ? 'flex' : 'none';

    // Calendar link
    const calLink = buildOutlookCalendarLink(emp);
    document.getElementById('calendar-link').href = calLink;

    showScreen('success-screen');
  }, 300);
}

// ── OUTLOOK CALENDAR LINK ──
function buildOutlookCalendarLink(emp) {
  const reviewDate = emp.review90;
  const startDate = reviewDate.replace(/-/g,'') + 'T090000';
  const endDate = reviewDate.replace(/-/g,'') + 'T100000';
  const subject = encodeURIComponent(`90-Day Review — ${emp.firstName} ${emp.lastName} (${emp.id})`);
  const body = encodeURIComponent(`90-day performance review for ${emp.firstName} ${emp.lastName}\nJob Title: ${emp.title}\nHire Date: ${emp.hireDate}\nEmployee ID: ${emp.id}`);
  return `https://outlook.live.com/calendar/0/deeplink/compose?subject=${subject}&body=${body}&startdt=${startDate}&enddt=${endDate}&path=/calendar/action/compose`;
}

// ── HELPERS ──
function generateID() {
  const next = employees.length + 1;
  return `CE-${String(next).padStart(3,'0')}`;
}

function calc90Day(hireDate) {
  if (!hireDate) return '';
  const d = new Date(hireDate + 'T12:00:00');
  d.setDate(d.getDate() + 90);
  return d.toISOString().split('T')[0];
}

function formatDate(dateStr) {
  if (!dateStr) return '—';
  const d = new Date(dateStr + 'T12:00:00');
  return d.toLocaleDateString('en-US', {month:'short', day:'numeric', year:'numeric'});
}

function daysUntil(dateStr) {
  if (!dateStr) return 999;
  const today = new Date();
  today.setHours(0,0,0,0);
  const target = new Date(dateStr + 'T12:00:00');
  return Math.ceil((target - today) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
}

// ── DASHBOARD RENDER ──
function renderDashboard() {
  const total = employees.length;
  const pending = employees.filter(e => e.status === 'pending').length;
  const complete = employees.filter(e => e.status === 'complete').length;
  const insuranceQueue = employees.filter(e => e.beneIns);

  document.getElementById('stat-total').textContent = total;
  document.getElementById('stat-pending').textContent = pending;
  document.getElementById('stat-insurance').textContent = insuranceQueue.length;
  document.getElementById('stat-complete').textContent = complete;

  // Insurance queue
  const iqSection = document.getElementById('insurance-queue-section');
  if (insuranceQueue.length > 0) {
    iqSection.style.display = 'block';
    const nextMonth = new Date();
    nextMonth.setMonth(nextMonth.getMonth() + 1);
    nextMonth.setDate(1);
    const enrollBy = nextMonth.toLocaleDateString('en-US', {month:'long', day:'numeric', year:'numeric'});
    document.getElementById('insurance-queue-desc').textContent =
      `${insuranceQueue.length} employee${insuranceQueue.length > 1 ? 's' : ''} pending enrollment — add to policy before the 1st of next month`;
    document.getElementById('insurance-queue-list').innerHTML = insuranceQueue.map(e => `
      <div class="alert-row">
        <div class="alert-id">${e.id}</div>
        <div class="alert-name">${e.firstName} ${e.lastName}</div>
        <div class="alert-role">${e.title}</div>
        <div class="alert-date">Enroll by<br>${enrollBy}</div>
        <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onclick="viewEmployee('${e.id}')">👁 View</button>
      </div>
    `).join('');
  } else {
    iqSection.style.display = 'none';
  }

  // 90-day review queue (next 30 days)
  const reviewQueue = employees.filter(e => {
    const days = daysUntil(e.review90);
    return days >= 0 && days <= 60;
  }).sort((a,b) => new Date(a.review90) - new Date(b.review90));

  const rvSection = document.getElementById('review-queue-section');
  if (reviewQueue.length > 0) {
    rvSection.style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('review-queue-list').innerHTML = reviewQueue.map(e => {
      const days = daysUntil(e.review90);
      const urgency = days <= 7 ? 'var(--red)' : days <= 14 ? 'var(--gold)' : 'var(--green)';
      return `
        <div class="review-row">
          <div class="alert-id">${e.id}</div>
          <div class="alert-name">${e.firstName} ${e.lastName}</div>
          <div class="alert-role">${e.title}</div>
          <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:${urgency};">
            ${days === 0 ? 'TODAY' : days < 0 ? 'Overdue' : `${days} days`}
            <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);font-weight:400;">${formatDate(e.review90)}</div>
          </div>
          <a class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" href="${buildOutlookCalendarLink(e)}" target="_blank">📅 Add</a>
        </div>
      `;
    }).join('');
  } else {
    rvSection.style.display = 'none';
  }

  // Employee list
  const list = document.getElementById('employee-list');
  if (employees.length === 0) {
    list.innerHTML = '<div class="empty-state">No employees yet. Add your first hire above.</div>';
    return;
  }

  const sorted = [...employees].sort((a,b) => new Date(b.submittedAt) - new Date(a.submittedAt));
  list.innerHTML = sorted.map(e => `
    <div class="table-row" onclick="viewEmployee('${e.id}')">
      <div class="table-id">${e.id}</div>
      <div>
        <div class="table-name">${e.firstName} ${e.lastName}</div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);">${e.dept || ''}</div>
      </div>
      <div class="table-role">${e.title}</div>
      <div class="table-date">${formatDate(e.hireDate)}</div>
      <div>
        <span class="status-badge ${e.status === 'complete' ? 'status-complete' : 'status-pending'}">
          ${e.status === 'complete' ? 'Complete' : 'Pending'}
        </span>
      </div>
    </div>
  `).join('');
}

// ── EMPLOYEE DETAIL MODAL ──
function viewEmployee(id) {
  const emp = employees.find(e => e.id === id);
  if (!emp) return;

  document.getElementById('modal-title').textContent = `${emp.firstName} ${emp.lastName} — ${emp.id}`;

  const payInfo = emp.payType === 'Hourly'
    ? `$${emp.hourlyRate}/hr`
    : `$${Number(emp.salary).toLocaleString()}/yr`;

  const assets = [
    emp.ipad ? 'iPad' : null,
    emp.card ? 'Credit Card' : null,
    emp.vehicle ? 'Vehicle' : null
  ].filter(Boolean);

  const html = `
    <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px;">
      ${makeDetailSection('Identity', [
        ['Employee ID', emp.id],
        ['Name', `${emp.firstName} ${emp.lastName}`],
        ['Email', emp.email || '—'],
        ['Cell Phone', emp.phone || '—'],
        ['Job Title', emp.title],
        ['Department', emp.dept || '—'],
        ['Manager', emp.manager || '—'],
      ])}
      ${makeDetailSection('Pay & Classification', [
        ['Pay Type', `${emp.payType} — ${payInfo}`],
        ['Billing Rate', emp.billingRate ? `$${emp.billingRate}/hr` : '—'],
        ['Pay Schedule', emp.paySchedule],
        ['Workers Comp', emp.wc || '—'],
        ['Occ Code', emp.occ || '—'],
        ['Billable', emp.billable ? 'Yes' : 'No'],
      ])}
      ${makeDetailSection('Hire Details', [
        ['Hire Date', formatDate(emp.hireDate)],
        ['90-Day Review', formatDate(emp.review90)],
        ['Work Location', emp.location || '—'],
      ])}
      ${makeDetailSection('Benefits', [
        ['401(k) Interest', emp.bene401k ? 'Yes — interested' : 'No'],
        ['Insurance Bundle Interest', emp.beneIns ? 'Yes — interested' : 'No'],
      ])}
      ${makeDetailSection('Equipment', [
        ['Assets', assets.length ? assets.join(', ') : 'None'],
      ])}
      ${makeDetailSection('Contractor Foreman', [
        ['Crew', emp.crew || '—'],
        ['CF Role', emp.cfRole || '—'],
        ['Login Email', emp.loginEmail || '—'],
        ['Login Access', emp.loginAccess ? 'Yes' : 'No'],
        ['Direct to Timecard', emp.timecard ? 'Yes' : 'No'],
        ['Show in Schedule', emp.crewSchedule ? 'Yes' : 'No'],
        ['Project Visibility', emp.visibility || '—'],
        ['Default Cost Code', emp.costCode || '—'],
      ])}
      ${emp.notes ? makeDetailSection('Notes', [['Internal Notes', emp.notes]]) : ''}
      <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
        <a class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" href="${buildOutlookCalendarLink(emp)}" target="_blank">📅 Add 90-Day Review</a>
        ${emp.status !== 'complete' ? `<button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onclick="markComplete('${emp.id}')">✓ Mark Complete</button>` : ''}
        <button class="btn btn-danger btn-sm" onclick="deleteEmployee('${emp.id}')">🗑 Delete</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  `;

  document.getElementById('modal-body').innerHTML = html;
  document.getElementById('detail-modal').classList.add('active');
}

function makeDetailSection(title, rows) {
  return `
    <div>
      <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;padding-bottom:6px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--gold-border);">${title}</div>
      ${rows.map(([k,v]) => `
        <div style="display:flex;padding:7px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--surface3);gap:12px;">
          <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);width:130px;flex-shrink:0;padding-top:1px;">${k}</div>
          <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:500;flex:1;">${v}</div>
        </div>
      `).join('')}
    </div>
  `;
}

function markComplete(id) {
  const emp = employees.find(e => e.id === id);
  if (emp) {
    emp.status = 'complete';
    localStorage.setItem('crown_employees', JSON.stringify(employees));
    closeModalDirect();
    renderDashboard();
  }
}

function deleteEmployee(id) {
  if (!confirm('Delete this employee record? This cannot be undone.')) return;
  employees = employees.filter(e => e.id !== id);
  localStorage.setItem('crown_employees', JSON.stringify(employees));
  closeModalDirect();
  renderDashboard();
}

function closeModal(e) {
  if (e.target === document.getElementById('detail-modal')) closeModalDirect();
}

function closeModalDirect() {
  document.getElementById('detail-modal').classList.remove('active');
}

// ── EXPORT TO EXCEL ──
function exportExcel() {
  if (employees.length === 0) {
    alert('No employees to export yet.');
    return;
  }

  const headers = [
    'Employee ID','First Name','Last Name','Email','Cell Phone','Job Title','Department','Manager',
    'Workers Comp Class','Occ Code','Billable',
    'Pay Type','Hourly Rate','Annual Salary','Billing Rate','Pay Schedule',
    'Hire Date','Work Location','90-Day Review',
    '401k Interest','Insurance Bundle Interest',
    'iPad','Credit Card','Vehicle',
    'Crew','CF Role','Login Email','Login Access','Direct to Timecard',
    'Show in Schedule','Project Visibility','Default Cost Code',    'Internal Notes','Status','Submitted At'
  ];

  const rows = employees.map(e => [
    e.id, e.firstName, e.lastName, e.email, e.phone || '', e.title, e.dept || '', e.manager || '',
    e.wc || '', e.occ || '', e.billable ? 'Yes' : 'No',
    e.payType, e.hourlyRate || '', e.salary || '', e.billingRate || '', e.paySchedule,
    e.hireDate, e.location || '', e.review90,
    e.bene401k ? 'Yes' : 'No', e.beneIns ? 'Yes' : 'No',
    e.ipad ? 'Yes' : 'No', e.card ? 'Yes' : 'No', e.vehicle ? 'Yes' : 'No',
    e.crew || '', e.cfRole || '', e.loginEmail || '',
    e.loginAccess ? 'Yes' : 'No', e.timecard ? 'Yes' : 'No',
    e.crewSchedule ? 'Yes' : 'No', e.visibility || '', e.costCode || '',
    e.notes || '', e.status, e.submittedAt
  ]);

  let csv = [headers, ...rows].map(r =>
    r.map(v => `"${String(v).replace(/"/g,'""')}"`).join(',')
  ).join('\n');

  const blob = new Blob([csv], {type:'text/csv'});
  const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  const a = document.createElement('a');
  a.href = url;
  a.download = `Crown_Employees_${new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}.csv`;
  a.click();
  URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
}

// ── RESET FORM ──
function resetForm() {
  ['f-first','f-last','f-email','f-phone','f-manager','f-occ','f-hourly','f-billing','f-salary','f-login','f-notes'].forEach(id => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (el) el.value = '';
  });
  ['f-title','f-dept','f-crew','f-cfrole','f-costcode'].forEach(id => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (el) el.value = '';
  });
  document.getElementById('f-location').value = CONFIG.workLocation;
  document.getElementById('f-payschedule').value = CONFIG.paySchedule;
  document.getElementById('f-wc').value = '';
  document.getElementById('pt-hourly').checked = true;

  document.getElementById('vis-all').checked = true;
  togglePayFields();

  ['f-billable','f-401k','f-bene-ins','f-ipad','f-card','f-vehicle',
   'f-login-access','f-timecard','f-schedule'].forEach(id => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (el) el.checked = false;
  });

  ['billable-check','bene-401k-check','bene-ins-check','ipad-check',
   'card-check','vehicle-check','login-check','timecard-check','schedule-check'].forEach(id => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (el) el.classList.remove('checked');
  });

  ['billable-box','bene-401k-box','bene-ins-box','ipad-box',
   'card-box','vehicle-box','login-box','timecard-box','schedule-box'].forEach(id => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (el) el.textContent = '';
  });

  ['f-wc','f-occ'].forEach(id => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (el) el.classList.remove('auto-filled');
  });

  ['wc-hint','occ-hint'].forEach(id => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (el) el.style.display = 'none';
  });

  document.getElementById('f-hiredate').value = '';
}

function newEmployee() {
  showForm();
}

function showEmailModal() {
  document.getElementById('email-to-field').textContent = CONFIG.notifyEmails.join(', ');
  document.getElementById('email-subject-field').textContent = window._lastEmailSubject || '';
  document.getElementById('email-body-field').value = window._lastEmailBody || '';
  document.getElementById('email-modal').style.display = 'flex';
}

function copyAndOpenMail() {
  copyEmailOnly();
  setTimeout(() => {
    const to = window._lastEmailTo || CONFIG.notifyEmails.join(',');
    const subject = window._lastEmailSubject || '';
    const mailtoLink = `mailto:${to}?subject=${encodeURIComponent(subject)}`;
    window.location.href = mailtoLink;
  }, 500);
}

function openMailApp() {
  showEmailModal();
}

function copyEmailOnly() {
  const subject = window._lastEmailSubject || '';
  const body = window._lastEmailBody || '';
  const full = `To: ${window._lastEmailTo || CONFIG.notifyEmails.join(', ')}\nSubject: ${subject}\n\n${body}`;
  const showConfirm = () => {
    const el = document.getElementById('email-copy-confirm');
    if (el) { el.style.display = 'block'; setTimeout(() => el.style.display = 'none', 3000); }
  };
  if (navigator.clipboard && navigator.clipboard.writeText) {
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(full).then(showConfirm).catch(() => fallbackCopyNew(full));
  } else { fallbackCopyNew(full); }
}

function copyEmailContent() { copyEmailOnly(); }

function fallbackCopyNew(text) {
  const ta = document.createElement('textarea');
  ta.value = text;
  ta.style.position = 'fixed';
  ta.style.opacity = '0';
  document.body.appendChild(ta);
  ta.focus();
  ta.select();
  try {
    document.execCommand('copy');
    const el = document.getElementById('email-copy-confirm');
    if (el) { el.style.display = 'block'; setTimeout(() => el.style.display = 'none', 3000); }
  } catch(e) {
    alert('Copy failed — select all text in the body field and copy manually.');
  }
  document.body.removeChild(ta);
}

function fallbackCopy(text) { fallbackCopyNew(text); }
</script>

<!-- EMAIL MODAL -->
<div class="modal-overlay" id="email-modal" style="display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.9);z-index:300;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:16px;">
  <div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--gold-border);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);width:100%;max-width:560px;max-height:85vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;">
    <div style="padding:14px 16px;background:var(--surface2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--surface3);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;border-radius:var(--radius-lg) var(--radius-lg) 0 0;">
      <div style="font-family:'Chakra Petch',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--gold);">📧 Send HR Notification</div>
      <button onclick="document.getElementById('email-modal').style.display='none'" style="background:none;border:1px solid var(--surface4);color:var(--text-muted);font-size:16px;cursor:pointer;width:28px;height:28px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border-radius:4px;">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div style="padding:16px;overflow-y:auto;flex:1;">
      <div style="margin-bottom:12px;">
        <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px;">To</div>
        <div style="background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--surface4);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:8px 12px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text);" id="email-to-field"></div>
      </div>
      <div style="margin-bottom:12px;">
        <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px;">Subject</div>
        <div style="background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--surface4);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:8px 12px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text);" id="email-subject-field"></div>
      </div>
      <div style="margin-bottom:12px;">
        <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px;">Body</div>
        <textarea id="email-body-field" readonly style="width:100%;background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--surface4);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:10px 12px;font-size:11px;color:var(--text);font-family:'Inter',monospace;line-height:1.6;min-height:200px;resize:none;outline:none;"></textarea>
      </div>
      <div id="email-copy-confirm" style="display:none;background:rgba(82,183,136,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(82,183,136,0.3);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:8px 12px;font-size:12px;color:var(--green);text-align:center;margin-bottom:10px;">✓ Copied to clipboard — open Mail and paste</div>
      <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;">
        <button class="btn btn-primary" style="width:100%;justify-content:center;padding:14px;" onclick="copyAndOpenMail()">📬 Copy &amp; Open Mail</button>
        <button class="btn btn-ghost" style="width:100%;justify-content:center;" onclick="copyEmailOnly()">📋 Copy Email Content Only</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</body>
</html>
